title: GK1H Accessorify+
description: Add-on for pajic's Accessorify made by GK1H.
body:
Add-on for pajic's Accessorify made by GK1H.

Features

Both Fabric & NeoForge

Compat for putting the Totem of Neverdying from Netherite Extras in the charm/totem slot.

NeoForge

Compat for putting Reinforced Shulker Boxes in the shulker slot. (Requires GK1H Tags.)

Links

CurseForge
